untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific metrics (Strangle_Return, Strangle_Price, StranglesMonthClosePrice, strangles_margin, Call_Delta, Call_Vega, Call_Theta, Call_Gamma, Put_Delta, Put_Vega, Put_Theta, Put_Gamma, and OTM moneyness verification) that are not available in the allowed indicator list. This is an options strategy signal requiring derivatives pricing and Greeks calculations beyond standard OHLCV backtesting capabilities.
translation_notes: The core signal logic relies on option strangle position metrics and Greek calculations. While volatility indicators (ADX_14, RSI_14) were suggested as proxies, they cannot accurately represent the return calculation based on strangle margin or the OTM moneyness requirement.
